---
title: "VOLEMIA: Non-Invasive Blood Pressure Estimation Using Temporal-Spectral Convolutional Network"
author:
  - Trishna Saikia
  - Satwik Vankayalapati
  - Puneet Gupta
  - Pasi Liljeberg
date: "2025-01-01"
slug: volemia-bp-estimation
categories:
  - research
  - blood pressure
  - PPG
  - healthcare AI
description: "Digital Signal Processing"
summary: "A temporal-spectral convolutional network for non-invasive blood pressure estimation from PPG signals."
subtitle: "A temporal-spectral convolutional network for non-invasive blood pressure estimation from PPG signals."
image: featured.jpg
links:
  - icon: file-richtext-fill
    name: Publication
    url: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.dsp.2025.105393
---

## Abstract

This work proposes **VOLEMIA**, a non-invasive blood pressure estimation framework based on temporal-spectral learning from PPG signals. The method combines pulse-based decomposition and physiological signal enhancement to improve systolic and diastolic blood pressure estimation.

## Key Contributions

- Developed a temporal-spectral convolutional network for SBP and DBP estimation.
- Combined temporal waveform information with spectral representations.
- Evaluated the method on physiological signal datasets.
- Demonstrated promising performance for non-invasive blood pressure monitoring.

## Publication

**Trishna Saikia**, Satwik Vankayalapati, Puneet Gupta, and Pasi Liljeberg.
“VOLEMIA: Non-Invasive Blood Pressure Estimation Using Temporal-Spectral Convolutional Network.”
*Digital Signal Processing*, 2025.
